**Post-Mortem: Production Outage - 47 minutes - 2023-02-15 13:15-14:02 UTC**

**Root-Cause Narrative:**
A misconfigured retry budget in the payment-service client was the root cause of the 47-minute production outage. The retry budget was set too high, causing the payment-service client to continue retrying failed requests indefinitely, which in turn caused a cascading failure in the downstream payment-processing pipeline. This led to a backlog of failed payments, which eventually resulted in a failure cascade that brought down the payment-processing system.

**Timeline:**

| Time (UTC) | Event | Who | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 13:15 | Initial failure detected | Alerting team | Alerting team receives initial failure reports from payment-processing system |
| 13:17 | Investigation begins | On-call engineer (me) | On-call engineer (me) starts investigating the failure, suspects retry budget issue |
| 13:20 | Commit identified as likely cause | On-call engineer (me) | On-call engineer (me) identifies commit that increased retry budget as likely cause |
| 13:23 | Revert commit attempt | On-call engineer (me) | On-call engineer (me) attempts to revert commit, but reverts wrong commit (payment-service client was not the actual problem) |
| 13:25 | Failure persists | On-call engineer (me) | On-call engineer (me) realizes mistake, starts re-investigating |
| 14:02 | Correct commit reverted | On-call engineer (me) | On-call engineer (me) successfully reverts correct commit (payment-service client retry budget reverted) |
| 14:05 | System recovers | On-call engineer (me) | Payment-processing system recovers, backlog of failed payments cleared |

**Action Items:**

| Action Item | Owner | Description | Deadline |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Update payment-service client retry budget | Payment-service client team | Update retry budget to default values | 2023-02-20 |
| Review canary deploy pipeline | DevOps team | Review canary deploy pipeline to ensure it catches similar issues | 2023-02-25 |
| Document retry budget configuration | Documentation team | Document retry budget configuration and default values in payment-service client | 2023-02-22 |

**What Would Have Caught This Earlier:**
A review of the canary deploy pipeline would have caught the retry budget issue earlier. The canary deploy pipeline is designed to catch issues like this before they reach production, but in this case, it failed to do so. Upon review, it was found that the canary deploy pipeline was not testing the payment-service client retry budget configuration. This gap in the pipeline allowed the retry budget issue to go undetected until it caused a production outage.

This post-mortem aims to provide a clear and candid account of the events leading up to the production outage, while also highlighting the lessons learned and areas for improvement.
